name: markcrawl
description: Crawl any website into clean Markdown, search through pages, read full content, and extract structured data using OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, or Grok — with auto-citation and resume support.

tools.name: crawl_site
tools.description: Crawl a website and save extracted content as Markdown or plain text files.

tools.name: search_pages
tools.description: Search through crawled pages by keyword with relevance-ranked results.

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Read the full extracted content of a specific crawled page by URL.

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List all crawled pages with their URLs, titles, and word counts.

tools.name: extract_data
tools.description: Extract structured fields from crawled pages using an LLM with auto-field discovery.
